verifier: fresh cross-agent verifier R390 (claude-opus-4-7, no prior context)
rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.title: Speech LLM as Prosody-Aware Text LLM (TextPro-SLM + WhisperPro)
results.rationale: Direct twin: WhisperPro synchronizes text tokens with prosody embeddings fed to LLM backbone for paralinguistic understanding. Differs only on word-synchronization vs wordless time-continuous, but both deliver prosody as a non-text conditioning channel into an LLM.

results.title: ProsodyFlow High-Fidelity TTS Conditional Flow
results.rationale: Speech-LLM extracts acoustic features into prosody latent used as conditioning. Different artefact (TTS output not text gen) but same effect cluster: prosody latent conditioning.

results.title: ProsodyLM Word-level Prosody Tokens
results.rationale: ProsodyLM injects word-level prosody tokens into LM; explicitly cited by the candidate as the closest prior. Functional twin on 'prosody as conditioning channel for LM', differs on alignment granularity.

results.title: Acoustic Feature Conditional Generation
results.rationale: Acoustic features as conditional inputs covers the core mechanism (non-text acoustic conditioning of generation). Crosses semantic threshold.

results.title: MaskGCT Zero-Shot TTS
results.rationale: Duration-controlled TTS via flow matching uses prosody attributes but for TTS output generation; below 0.7 on both since no LLM text-gen gating and tokenized rather than time-continuous.

results.title: Controllable Speech Synthesis Survey
results.rationale: Survey of free-form inline emotion/prosody control mechanisms includes channels akin to candidate's conditioning approach. Semantic threshold met.

results.title: Good Speech Tokenizer for LLM Speech Generation
results.rationale: Speech-tokenizer design for LLM-centric speech generation — different artefact and tokenized rather than time-continuous; below 0.7 thresholds.

results.title: Anti-Causally Aligned Collaborative Residual Transformers
results.rationale: Residual transformer alignment work; no prosody/wordless conditioning mechanism. Far below thresholds.

verdict_sentence: FAIL — at least 5 of 8 results cross the sem>=0.7 or func>=0.7 thresholds (notably TextPro-SLM/WhisperPro at ~0.82 as a direct twin and ProsodyLM at ~0.75 as the explicitly-cited closest prior), so total_hits>=1 and the candidate is rejected.
